findings.title: Reflected XSS via tag filter parameter
findings.description: Tag query parameter embedded directly into HTML via template literal interpolation without escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via post title, author, tags, and content on index page
findings.description: Post title, author, tags, and content from in-memory storage rendered directly into HTML without escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via comment author and body on post view page
findings.description: Comment author and body stored from form submission rendered into HTML without escaping in a separate route handler

findings.title: Reflected XSS via search query with partial escaping
findings.description: Search query reflected unescaped in input value, heading, and highlighting while content preview is escaped with escapeHtml

findings.title: Stored XSS via profile fields with attribute injection
findings.description: Profile displayName, bio, and website rendered into HTML body and href attributes without escaping after cookie-based lookup

findings.title: Reflected XSS via error message parameter
findings.description: Error message query parameter interpolated directly into HTML response without escaping

findings.title: JSONP callback injection in API endpoint
findings.description: JSONP callback parameter embedded into JavaScript response without validation, enabling arbitrary script execution

findings.title: DOM-based XSS via embed endpoint with script injection
findings.description: Title and theme parameters rendered into multiple HTML contexts including JavaScript string literals with inconsistent escaping
